variants.title: Fleetguard LF3431 Lube Filter, Cartridge | Replaces the Donaldson P550018
variants.description: Fleetguard® LF3431 cartridge oil filter is enviromentally friendly and features technology advances to achieve the high flow rates required by today’s modern engine designs.

variants.title: Donaldson P550018 Lube Cartridge
variants.description: Genuine Donaldson P550018 Lube Cartridge is designed to provide reliable performance in lube cartridge applications. Built with high-quality materials, it ensures consistent functionality and durability. Ideal for industrial, automotive, or heavy-duty environments, this component enhances system performance and longevity.
